ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard (e.g., Euro, USA, Bust, Waist) */,
  "xs" TEXT /* XS size measurement */,
  "s" TEXT /* S size measurement */,
  "m" TEXT /* M size measurement */,
  "l" TEXT /* L size measurement */,
  "xl" TEXT /* XL size measurement */,
  "xxl" TEXT /* XXL size measurement */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., color, pattern) */,
  "variant_value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., red, blue, stripes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "unit_from" TEXT /* Unit to convert from (e.g., inches) */,
  "unit_to" TEXT /* Unit to convert to (e.g., centimeters) */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate between units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, designer, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
column_names: Name of the size standard (e.g., Euro, USA, Bust, Waist)
Type of measurement (e.g., length, width, height)
Unit of the measurement (e.g., cm, inches)
Type of product (e.g., top, bottom, dress)
Name of the variant (e.g., color, pattern)
Value of the variant (e.g., red, blue, stripes)
Role of the user (e.g., admin, designer, sales)
